data_collected.source_quote: Klarna collects personal data that you provide, including contact information, identification information, and payment information. Additionally, Klarna collects personal data from credit and fraud prevention agencies.

purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Klarna processes the personal data needed to deliver the Services, including data relating to your previous purchases.

sold_to_third_parties.source_quote: Klarna doesn't provide data to third parties for financial benefit.

used_for_profiling.source_quote: Klarna shares personal information with third parties for credit assessment and fraud prevention purposes.

third_party_recipients.source_quote: Klarna collects personal data from credit and fraud prevention agencies, stores, and public databases. Klarna will only share with third parties as described in their Privacy Policy or with consent.

retention_period.source_quote: Data for service delivery retained while account active; credit lookups 90 days; debt-related data 3 years after conclusion; recordings up to 2 years; compliance data up to 10 years after relationship ends.

access_your_data.source_quote: Users can review and access a copy of all personal data that Klarna stores about them at any time.

delete_your_data.source_quote: Users have the right to request deletion of their personal data, and when exercised, their data will be deleted and all agreements will be terminated.

correct_inaccuracies.source_quote: Users may request to know, access, correct, or delete personal information they have provided.

encrypted_in_transit.source_quote: Klarna uses advanced encryption methods (AES-256 and TLS) to secure data transmission and storage.

encrypted_at_rest.source_quote: Klarna uses advanced encryption methods (AES-256 and TLS) to secure data transmission and storage.

breach_notification.source_quote: Klarna is PCI DSS Level 1 certified, the highest level of payment security certification available.

independent_audits.source_quote: Klarna is PCI DSS Level 1 certified and uses Open Banking protocols.

gaps: opt-out of sharing mechanisms not specified
GPC and DNT signal handling not mentioned
label_notes: Klarna provides clear data retention periods and user rights for access and deletion. Security is a stated priority with PCI DSS Level 1 certification. However, gaps exist around data portability, appeal mechanisms, and specific handling of tracking signals. Requires legal obligation to retain data even after deletion requests.
